creator: sunpoet@sunpoet.net
text:
Alter apache-ant source from zip archive to tar.bz2 archive, just as openjdk 6 does.
Users who install both openjdk 6 and 7 have no need to keep two identical source files.
[DESCRIBE CHANGES]

Port maintainer (glewis@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
